calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Continued To Jul-19-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Company.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ruth Singer.
09:55 am. - Plaintiff's witness: Willie Abasta, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Rental Agreement dtd. 10-22-01--------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three days notice dtd.04-15-04--------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - Four photographs----------------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #4 - Letter dtd. 01-30-04------------------------- ID/EVID
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 737 Folsom St., #313, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $500.08
Costs $273.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibitS.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
